description: VPD bands and environmental setpoints for leafy greens growth stages

propagation.name: Propagation
propagation.description: Seed germination and early seedling development (0-10 days)
propagation.notes: High humidity to prevent seed desiccation. Narrow VPD band to encourage root development.

vegetative.name: Vegetative Growth
vegetative.description: Active leaf development and biomass accumulation (10-21 days)
vegetative.notes: Moderate VPD to drive transpiration and nutrient uptake without stressing plants.

finishing.name: Finishing / Pre-Harvest
finishing.description: Final growth and hardening before harvest (21-35 days)
finishing.notes: Higher VPD to reduce disease risk and improve shelf life. Lower humidity to reduce post-harvest rot.

transitions.description: Gradual setpoint changes to avoid shocking plants
transitions.notes: When transitioning between stages, ramp setpoints linearly over 6 hours in 30-minute increments.

cultivarVariations.description: Adjust these base setpoints for specific cultivars

basil.adjustments: Prefer warmer temps (24-26°C vegetative) and higher VPD (1.0-1.4 kPa finishing)

lettuce_butterhead.adjustments: Cooler temps (16-20°C finishing) to prevent bolting, moderate VPD

kale.adjustments: Tolerates wider VPD range (0.5-1.3 kPa), cooler temps improve flavor

microgreens.adjustments: Short cycle (7-14 days), maintain propagation-like conditions throughout

safeLimits.description: Absolute bounds - never exceed these regardless of stage

temperature.reason: Below 14°C slows growth; above 26°C increases disease risk and respiration losses

humidity.reason: Below 45% causes excessive transpiration; above 95% high disease risk

vpd.reason: Below 0.3 kPa condensation risk; above 1.5 kPa plant stress
